Brother Xave's Headband  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: HEAD
AC: 45
STR: +15 DEX: +10 STA: +10 AGI: +10 HP: +75
SV FIRE: +15 SV DISEASE: +15 SV COLD: +15 SV MAGIC: +15 SV POISON: +15
Haste: +41%
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: MNK
Race: HUM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: HEAD
AC: 45
STR: +15 DEX: +10 STA: +10 AGI: +10 HP: +75
SV FIRE: +15 SV DISEASE: +15 SV COLD: +15 SV MAGIC: +15 SV POISON: +15
Haste: +41%
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: MNK
Race: HUM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Headband of the Chosen
Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Cloth
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Light:Greater Lightstone
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:zebantik
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 09:59:32
Page Updated:Sun Feb 20th, 2022

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 58
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Vulak`Aerr


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded February 20th, 2022 by halfridge
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
Sony needs to wake-up
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2005 at 3:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591813378393
19 posts
i've been playing EQ for about a year & 1/2. Currently the population is dwindling, seems Sony has blinders on without having the 'Force'. Not being a power gamer but a casual player, as old as this item is, i would still beam a smile if my Monk had it. Perhaps Sony could revitalize ToVeeshan &/or retune the loots. Something to entice players to return there. The AC is still more than decent upon this for today. Make the Xave's have 175 HPs now, add 150 END to it, maybe a regeneration amount, & a Faerune effect possibly. As Sony's EQ growing majority of power gamers & true veterans remain the core population, the casual &/or true new players will be weeded out since Sony seems to not care nor cater to their concerns. Sony needs to open the game up, allow progression, allow fun, achieving goals & give a reason to want to play EQ as a game & not as work. But as is i still want the Xave's hehe too bad i wont ever see let alone acquire.

Edited, Wed Nov 2 16:11:55 2005
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 23 2003 at 12:47 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) how the heck did this guys get this headband?
RE: what the?
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2004 at 8:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1606090711584
128 posts
Brother Xave was Lead GM for Mithaniel Marr ... He had one of the better senses of Humor ... i was online when he had to leave the game ... he turned 23 same day ... I seem to remember all zones getting messages like " a portal opens in the heavens to accept a Monk Hero" ... brother xave had to leave the game..... this was years ago when the game had just gotten Kunark.
▲ Page top

i have a question to VI why the sadd do they make items that are almost impossible to get? a guild will most likely go on a raid once in a eq lifetime for the items that drop off this boss mob
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 25 2002 at 11:15 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Umm, because if they did not, all the level 60s would have nothing to do, and quit. Oh, and the uber guild or guilds on a server clear all of tov every week or two.

QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2002 at 4:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253717399
34 posts
I have a question to VI too. Why not 100hps on it? Hmm one of the hardest encounters in the game, drops a 75 hps item (well it used to be one of them, now it a) does not exist :P) and b) is outstripped by luclin encounters)

RE: wtf
QuoteReply
# Sep 14 2004 at 8:03 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246127536
58 posts
not a bad point to be honest.... I am doing a VP quest right now for a mask with 140hp on it... that I can do most of with guilds druid-bot and 1 friend... It does require some faction but it is way easy to do compared with getting this!

Seems to me this mobs drops could get a facelift.

I had the pleasure of knowing Xave in his GM duties and I think it is a great thing that they put this great item into the game with his name on it. He was the best GM that I have run into in my many travels. Not saying that other GMs arent good just that Xave was better.



and just for the record this is probably a monk item because Xave's avatar was a monk.


Be nice to he Guides you never know when you might need one

Like hell it is! This thing has Wizzy written all over it! He was an awesome GM, he was a very nice guy and a good GM, back when VI had actual customer service... he was a good guy and a good gm.. but i dont think VI cared for him very much, so they pushed him out, and has since gave us set of incompetant assbrains to try to fill his shoes...
